'''Stor''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] student who attended the [[Carida Academy/Legends|Academy of Carida]] during the [[Rise of the Empire era|Imperial era]]. During his graduation in [[4 BBY/Legends|4 BBY]], he served as Cadet Company Commander; when his company was marching towards the cliff, he forgot to call halt, and as a result, the first rank fell to their [[Death/Legends|deaths]].

Stor later committed suicide by jumping off the same cliff. His death was upheld by the instructors at the Academy as a mark of honor and responsibility.

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire]]'' {{1stm}}
